name: agent-run-cache
description: Local run cache for coding-agent CLI sessions.

scripts.app:dev: npm run build && node dist/cli.js app-dev
scripts.app:package: npm run app:icons && npm run build && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('apps/arc-app/release',{recursive:true,force:true})" && pnpm --dir apps/arc-app build && pnpm --dir apps/arc-app exec electron-builder --dir --config electron-builder.config.js && node scripts/verify-arc-app-package.mjs && node scripts/verify-packaged-cold-launch.mjs
scripts.app:package:linux: npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.rmSync('apps/arc-app/release',{recursive:true,force:true});fs.mkdirSync('apps/arc-app/.tmp-electron-builder',{recursive:true})" && pnpm --dir apps/arc-app build && cd apps/arc-app && TMPDIR=$PWD/.tmp-electron-builder pnpm exec electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.config.js && cd ../.. && node scripts/verify-arc-app-package.mjs
scripts.app:package:linux:deb: npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.rmSync('apps/arc-app/release',{recursive:true,force:true});fs.mkdirSync('apps/arc-app/.tmp-electron-builder',{recursive:true})" && pnpm --dir apps/arc-app build && cd apps/arc-app && TMPDIR=$PWD/.tmp-electron-builder pnpm exec electron-builder --linux deb --config electron-builder.config.js && cd ../.. && node scripts/verify-arc-app-package.mjs
scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log('Agent Run Cache installed. In a repo checkout, run npm run app:start to open the ARC desktop workbench.')"
scripts.smoke: npm run build && node dist/cli.js smoke
